context.goal: Select a single character in the title text on the page so it can be edited or deleted.
context.cues: The editor is in text selection mode, showing the expanded text toolbar and the title text 'arketing Basics' centered on the page.

state_anchor.locator: bottom status text 'Select text mode : Click and drag to select a text'

anchors.locator: the character near the start of the centered title text, around the 'r' in 'arketing Basics'

procedure.expect: The target character in the title is highlighted with a red text selection rectangle.
